connectionCard.stoppedDesc: Start the gateway to let IDEs connect through McpMux.
connectionCard.pendingApprovalsDesc: Review and approve to let them through.
connectionCard.connectDesc: VS Code & Cursor are one-click. The rest copy a config you paste into your IDE's MCP settings. Either path ends with an approval prompt here.
